creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #1)
Indeed, the issue was solved upstream in 2020 via:

    https://github.com/lichray/nvi2/commit/0ef1c824648bcfe9f831a9607cb465b18e313d1d
    Don't expandtab when we're in command mode.

I'm not sure when FreeBSD picked up this fix but vi the 14.1 base has the desired pre-FreeBSD-10 behavior.

(I have always found it surprising that the bugzilla dashboard does not show me open PRs for which I am the reporter...)
